items.job_title: Working Student (f/m/d) - Technical Writing & Team Support
items.job_description: SAP is hiring a working student for Technical Writing and Team Support in Walldorf within the Platform CoE inside SAP IT. The role helps turn complex technical topics into clear documentation and communication materials for developers, colleagues, and stakeholders; creates and maintains user guides, internal how-tos, and slide decks; supports the team by organizing information, preparing meetings, and keeping wikis, project boards, and presentations up to date; and works closely with engineers and product managers to improve how the team communicates what it builds. The posting asks for a student in computer science or a comparable field, Office skills, a programming language as a plus, strong written and verbal English, German as a plus, strong organization, teamwork, creativity, and regular work from the Walldorf office.
requirements: Student at a university or university of applied sciences
Preferred field of study: Computer Science or comparable
Strong written and verbal English; German is a plus
Office skills; a programming language is a plus
Team player with strong organizational ability
Creative and strong interest in writing
Ability to create and maintain user guides, internal how-tos, and presentation materials
Comfort working closely with engineers and product managers
Working from the Walldorf office is required
items.contact_lookup_status: No named recruiter or contact was visible on the SAP careers posting checked on 2026-04-12, so the letter uses Hiring Team as the fallback.

items.job_title: Working Student (f/m/d) - Threat Modelling Service Operation and Automation
items.job_description: SAP is hiring a working student for Threat Modelling Service Operation and Automation in Walldorf, with regular work from the Walldorf or Dresden office required. The role operates the Threat Model Service through Jira request handling, scheduling, and follow-through on outcomes; improves automation around scheduling, assessments, and finding handling; supports backend service development related to threat modelling; and helps create and implement a prioritized backlog for automation and service-handling improvements. The posting asks for a student in computer science or information security, programming familiarity including Python or Java, strong English, German as a plus, self-driven teamwork, Jira familiarity, workflow automation experience especially around Jira or Outlook, and beneficial hands-on experience with agents and AI-aided development.
requirements: Student at a university or university of applied sciences
Preferred fields of study: Computer Science or Information Security
Programming familiarity including Python or Java
Full working proficiency in English; German is a plus
Self-driven, open-minded, and strong sense of urgency
Ability to operate and improve a Jira-based service workflow
Experience designing and implementing workflow automations, especially around Jira issues or Outlook meeting requests, is beneficial
Hands-on experience with agents and AI-aided development is beneficial
Working regularly from Walldorf or Dresden office is required
items.contact_lookup_status: No named recruiter or contact was visible on the SAP careers posting checked on 2026-04-12, so the letter uses Hiring Team as the fallback.

items.job_title: Praktikum oder Werkstudent – Technologiemanagement im CTO-Office (m/w/d)
items.job_description: SCHUNK is hiring a Praktikum oder Werkstudent – Technologiemanagement im CTO-Office (m/w/d). The role supports the CTO office in further developing the technology strategy, developing a technology toolbox, aligning closely with specialist departments, consolidating and visualizing the technology toolbox in SharePoint, preparing MS Office documents for internal and external communication, and organizing and shaping workshops in the CTO area. The posting asks for Master students in industrial engineering, business informatics, mechanical engineering, or comparable programs, very good MS Office skills especially in PowerPoint and Excel, SharePoint knowledge as a plus, analytical and strategic thinking, quick comprehension, enthusiasm for modularization and technology/product platforms, and a structured, goal-oriented working style. The public snippets do not mention a German language requirement.
requirements: Current master student in industrial engineering, business informatics, mechanical engineering, or a comparable field
Very good MS Office skills, especially PowerPoint and Excel
SharePoint knowledge is an advantage
Analytical and strategic thinking with quick comprehension
Interest in modularization, technology/toolboxes, and platform thinking
Structured and goal-oriented way of working
items.contact_lookup_status: The public snippet associated with the role shows Lara Schneider as the hiring-team contact, so the letter uses her name in the salutation.

items.job_title: Werkstudent / Praktikant (m/w/d) Cloud FinOps - Technical Cost Optimization & Analytics
items.job_description: Schwarz Digits is hiring a working student or intern in Cloud FinOps with a focus on technical cost optimization and analytics. The role supports cost transparency, analytical evaluation of cloud usage, optimization opportunities, collaboration with technical teams, and structured reporting in a cloud-native environment.
requirements: Interest in cloud-native systems and technical cost optimization
Analytical mindset and comfort with data-driven work
Ability to support reporting, dashboards, and structured analysis
Strong communication with technical and business stakeholders
Interest in building technical depth through real operational work
Student profile aligned with business informatics, software engineering, or adjacent technical-business programs
Excel, PowerPoint, analytics, cloud, cost optimization, reporting, governance
items.contact_lookup_status: Named recruiter verified from the official Schwarz Digits posting page on 2026-03-27.

items.job_description: Schwarz Digits is hiring a working student in Data-Automation in Weinsberg within IT Consulting. The role focuses on migrating existing SAP-related automations from Excel to Google Sheets, adapting scripts and logic so the workflows still work in the new environment, and following a structured approval process while delivering roughly two to three solutions per workday.
requirements: Current studies in business informatics, computer science, or a comparable field
Interest in Google Apps Script
Good knowledge of Microsoft Excel or Google Sheets
Structured and careful working style
Enjoyment of efficient process execution
Ability to adapt scripts and logic in a controlled workflow
Comfort working within a defined approval and release process
items.contact_lookup_status: Named recruiter Laura Ehlbeck and the Weinsberg address were verified from the official Schwarz Digits posting checked on 2026-04-12.

items.job_description: Schwarz Digits is hiring a working student in Detection Engineering within IT Security. requirements: Student in computer science, business informatics, or a comparable field
Initial exposure to cyber security and security-relevant data is beneficial
Interest in data administration or similar technical areas
Strong analytical and communication skills
Ability to work independently and collaboratively

items.job_description: Stadtwerke Stuttgart is hiring a working student in agile project management in Stuttgart. The role supports the interdisciplinary program Volle Kraft with visualization of complex content in PowerPoint and Miro, maintenance of program and project steering tools such as Miro and Monday, support for program leadership through documentation and review of agile events, and project work around CO2 neutrality and renewable energy. The role is part-time, home office possible, and expects 12 to 20 hours across at least two days per week.
requirements: Current studies in industrial engineering, economics, business psychology, renewable energy, sustainability communication, business informatics, social sciences, or a comparable field
Initial experience in project management and agile methods is an advantage
Strong interest in visualizing complex content in PowerPoint or Miro
Interest in agile methods, organizational development, multiproject management, and new work
Strong communication skills and independent working style
items.contact_lookup_status: No named recruiter was visible on the live StepStone posting checked on 2026-03-28, so the letter uses Hiring Team as the fallback.

items.company_location: Multiple locations, Germany (Stuttgart / Berlin / Bremen / Göppingen / Karlsruhe / München)
items.job_description: TeamViewer Germany GmbH is hiring a Work Student in Product Management for TeamViewer ONE across multiple German locations. The role supports product managers in day-to-day product operations for SMB and Enterprise use cases, including competitor research, market analysis, management presentations, participation in agile product rituals, support for product meetings and workshops, maintenance of a globally active internal knowledge community, preparation of product requirements and customer feedback topics, operational coordination, and ownership of smaller initiatives from idea to implementation. The posting asks for an enrolled student in business administration, business informatics, industrial engineering, international management, product/project management, marketing, computer science, or a related field, strong interest in B2B SaaS and enterprise technology, PowerPoint and Excel proficiency, strong communication, and fluent English; German is a plus.
requirements: Enrolled student in business administration, business informatics, industrial engineering, international management, product or project management, marketing, computer science, or a related field
Looking for practical product-management experience alongside studies
Strong interest in B2B software products, SaaS platforms, and enterprise technology
High affinity for software products and digital platforms
Very good proficiency in Microsoft PowerPoint and Excel
Ability to work in cross-functional teams while managing tasks independently
Strong written and verbal communication skills
Fluency in English; German is a plus
items.contact_lookup_status: No named recruiter was visible on the public TeamViewer careers posting checked on 2026-04-12, so the letter uses Hiring Team as the fallback.
